testsuite.name: Chrome Headless 147.0.0.0 (Windows 10)

property.name: browser.fullName
property.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/147.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

testcase.name: ForumListComponent getAuthorName() should return mapped name for known userId
ForumListComponent onCategoryChange() should update selectedCategory and reload forums
ForumListComponent should initialize with loading=true then false after load
ForumListComponent should create
ForumListComponent should load forums on init
ForumListComponent formatDate() should return minutes ago for recent dates
ForumListComponent formatDate() should return days ago for older dates
ForumListComponent getAuthorName() should return fallback "User {id}" for unknown userId
ForumListComponent displayedForums should return all posts when showMyPosts is false
ForumListComponent formatEventDate() should return month and day
ForumListComponent viewForum() should navigate to forum detail page
ForumListComponent loadForums() should set loading=false on error
ForumListComponent formatLevel() should return Beginner for undefined
ForumListComponent formatLevel() should capitalize level string
ForumListComponent setPostFilter() should update showMyPosts and reload forums
ForumListComponent displayedForums should filter to current user posts when showMyPosts is true
ForumListComponent createForum() should navigate to forum create page
ForumListComponent deleteForum() should reload forums after confirmation
ForumService getForumById() should GET a single post by id
ForumService updateForum() should PUT updated post data
ForumService markBestAnswer() should PUT to mark a comment as best answer
ForumService getForums() should include category param when provided
ForumService getPendingPosts() should GET pending posts
ForumService reactToPost() should POST a reaction
ForumService createForum() should POST a new post
ForumService deleteForum() should DELETE a post
ForumService getComments() should GET comments for a post
ForumService updatePostStatus() should PUT status with query param
ForumService addComment() should POST a new comment
ForumService getUserReputation() should GET user reputation profile
ForumService getLeaderboard() should GET leaderboard with limit param
ForumService should be created
ForumService getForums() should GET all posts without filters
ForumService getReactionCounts() should GET reaction counts for a post
ForumService getForums() should include userId param when provided
ParticipationService should be created
ParticipationService getParticipants() should GET participants for an event
ParticipationService removeParticipant() should send DELETE request
ParticipationService addParticipant() should POST a new participant to an event
ParticipationService getParticipants() should return empty array on error fallback
ParticipationService confirm() should GET with token query param
EventsListComponent deleteEvent() should reload events after successful deletion
EventsListComponent createEvent() should navigate to create page
EventsListComponent viewEvent() should navigate to event details
EventsListComponent should set loading=false on error
EventsListComponent topEvents should exclude CANCELLED and FINISHED events
EventsListComponent topEvents should return at most 3 events sorted by attendees descending
EventsListComponent should create
EventsListComponent should load events on init
EventsListComponent formatFullDate() should return a full date string
EventsListComponent formatDate() should return month and day strings
EventsListComponent deleteEvent() should NOT call service when confirm is rejected
EventService updateEvent() should PUT updated event data
EventService getEvents() should handle empty array response
EventService createEvent() should POST and return created event
EventService getEvents() should return a list of events via GET
EventService getEventById() should return a single event by id via GET
EventService should be created
EventService deleteEvent() should send DELETE request
